title: Streamlit Planner — seq length sweep
intent: Load the DeepSeek-V3 golden fixture, sweep sequence length from 2K to 32K, and watch the KV cache bar dominate the stacked VRAM chart.

steps.intent: Planner loaded with the default fixture; sidebar exposes seq length, concurrent users, and quantisation controls.
Sidebar expanded, showing the sequence length slider at its default 4096 tokens.
Sequence length bumped upward; the stacked VRAM chart re-renders with a taller KV cache band.
Per-layer KV contribution heatmap visible below the main chart; deeper layers contribute more memory.
Export row in view: vLLM, llama.cpp, and MLX buttons ready to emit deploy-ready configs for the current plan.
